title: Orbital Laser
description: This pack adds an orbital laser cannon to the game - survival friendly!
body:
### What does the pack add?
This pack adds a survival friendly orbital laser cannon

### How to get the the slightly destructive laser pointer?
You can craft an orbital marker in a crafting table, but before you can even use it you have to build the cannon itself, duh

****
